title: Worked Example - Monitoring Ocean Research Data

content.problemStatement:
In this example, we use `float` to store the average ocean temperature recorded by a sensor (requires fewer decimal places), and `double` to track the total depth measured during a deep-sea dive (requires high precision).

**When executed, the code will show:**
```java
Average Ocean Temperature: 22.37 °C  
Deepest Recorded Depth: 10994.567891 meters
```
